short: AI that works with more than one kind of input or output, such as text, images, and audio.
definition: Multimodal AI can take in or produce more than one kind of data — text, images, audio, or video — rather than just one. A multimodal model might describe a photo, answer questions about a chart, or generate an image from a sentence. Combining modalities makes AI more flexible and closer to how people perceive the world.
